name: Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 29 oz Can cling peaches halves; Drain, save 1/4 cup syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork chops lightly on both sides in a skillet.
2. Pour off excess fat.
3. Combine brown sugar, cinnamon, cloves, tomato sauce, 1/4 cup peach syrup, and vinegar in a bowl. Season the pork chops with salt and pepper.
4. Arrange the seasoned pork chops in a slow cooker.
5. Place peach halves on top of the pork chops.
6. Pour the tomato mixture over everything.
7. Cover and cook on LOW for 4-6 hours.
